info.title: Dyalog Content Management System
info.description: API for managing content in the Dyalog Content Management System

presented_at.description: Year and month of presentation as YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss

published_at.description: YouTube video publish date as YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss

from.description: Ordinal number of the first result on this page

to.description: Ordinal number of the last result on this page

total.description: Total count of results for this query

links.description: Link objects describe numbered, previous and next buttons used on paginated results pages

CRUDObject.description: Objects affected by the CRUD operation with table-specific fields

exclusive_time.description: Time spent in this function, excluding time spent in called functions

inclusive_time.description: Time spent in this function, including time spent in called functions

200.description: List of videos or paginated videos

get.summary: Get recommended videos for a specific video
